steps.name: trust-evidence-inventory
steps.summary: PTQ1 added scripts/product_trust_evidence_inventory.py, tests/test_product_trust_evidence_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ptq1-trust-evidence-inventory.md. It classifies 8 trust evidence sources by product role, speed, public safety, protected-data dependency, and next gaps for PTQ2~PTQ5.

steps.name: review-pack-confidence-contract
steps.summary: PTQ2 added scripts/review_pack_confidence_contract.py, tests/test_review_pack_confidence_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ptq2-review-pack-confidence-contract.md. It labels review-pack sections as ready, caution, or human_review_required using existing review memo, journal, disclosure, authority-boundary, and human-review signals without changing accounting judgment logic.

steps.name: failure-boundary-matrix
steps.summary: PTQ3 added scripts/failure_boundary_matrix.py, tests/test_failure_boundary_matrix.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ptq3-failure-boundary-matrix.md. It maps retrieval, citation, client-private fact, unsupported workflow, authority boundary, and default promotion failures to operator actions, verification commands, and escalation boundaries.

steps.name: promotion-decision-evidence-pack
steps.summary: PTQ4 added scripts/promotion_decision_evidence_pack.py, tests/test_promotion_decision_evidence_pack.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-ptq4-promotion-decision-evidence.md. It ties RAG final gate, default retriever guard, and PTQ3 failure boundaries into a product-facing decision: default promotion remains deferred because explicit authorization is absent.

steps.name: trust-quality-close-gate
steps.summary: PTQ5 added scripts/product_trust_quality_gate.py, tests/test_product_trust_quality_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-product-trust-quality-close-report.md. It closes the horizon by tying PTQ1 inventory, PTQ2 confidence labels, PTQ3 failure boundaries, PTQ4 promotion decision, default guard, and firm-facing surface gate together; default promotion remains deferred.
